name: pi-interaction-group
description: Logical package group for the pi-interaction runtime split

scripts.fix: npm --prefix ./pi-editor-registry run fix && npm --prefix ./pi-interaction-kit run fix && npm --prefix ./pi-trigger-adapter run fix && npm --prefix ./pi-interaction run fix
scripts.check: npm --prefix ./pi-editor-registry run check && npm --prefix ./pi-interaction-kit run check && npm --prefix ./pi-trigger-adapter run check && npm --prefix ./pi-interaction run check
